title: IV Administration Set 105” Tubing by Vastmed | Sterile Individual Packaging for Lab and Pets Veterinary

sellables.title: Default
sellables.product_title: IV Administration Set 105” Tubing by Vastmed | Sterile Individual Packaging for Lab and Pets Veterinary
sellables.full_title: IV Administration Set 105” Tubing by Vastmed | Sterile Individual Packaging for Lab and Pets Veterinary

product.title: IV Administration Set 105” Tubing by Vastmed | Sterile Individual Packaging for Lab and Pets Veterinary
product.description: The AC3110 IV Administration Set is designed for controlled fluid delivery with a 10 drop/mL drip chamber and extended 105-inch tubing. Featuring a non-vented configuration, precision roller clamp, dual needle-free Y-sites, and rotating male luer lock, this set provides flexible setup and secure connectivity. Approximate priming volume: 20 mL. Sterile. Single-use. Individually packaged. Ideal for laboratory, research, and veterinary applications.
